mapper.select: SELECT rs.id,rs.shop_id,rs.region,rs.biz_date,rs.start_time,rs.end_time,rs.capacity,rs.reserved_count,rs.confirm_mode,rs.cancel_before_minutes,rs.enabled,s.name AS shop_name FROM reservation_slot rs JOIN shop s ON s.id=rs.shop_id WHERE rs.shop_id=#{shopId} AND rs.region=#{region} AND rs.biz_date=#{date} AND rs.enabled=TRUE ORDER BY rs.start_time

SELECT rs.id,rs.shop_id,rs.region,rs.biz_date,rs.start_time,rs.end_time,rs.capacity,rs.reserved_count,rs.confirm_mode,rs.cancel_before_minutes,rs.enabled,s.name AS shop_name FROM reservation_slot rs JOIN shop s ON s.id=rs.shop_id WHERE rs.id=#{slotId} AND rs.shop_id=#{shopId} AND rs.region=#{region} AND rs.enabled=TRUE
mapper.update: UPDATE reservation_slot SET reserved_count=reserved_count+#{people},updated_at=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id=#{slotId} AND enabled=TRUE AND reserved_count+#{people}<=capacity
UPDATE reservation_slot SET reserved_count=CASE WHEN reserved_count>=#{people} THEN reserved_count-#{people} ELSE 0 END,updated_at=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id=#{slotId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reservation(reservation_no,user_id,shop_id,slot_id,region,reserve_time,people_count,contact_name,contact_phone,remark,status,confirmed_at) VALUES(#{reservationNo},#{userId},#{shopId},#{slotId},#{region},#{reserveTime},#{peopleCount},#{contactName},#{contactPhone},#{remark},#{status},CASE WHEN #{status}=1 THEN CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ELSE NULL END)
mapper.select: SELECT FROM reservation r JOIN shop s ON s.id=r.shop_id LEFT JOIN reservation_slot rs ON rs.id=r.slot_id WHERE r.id=#{id} AND r.user_id=#{userId} AND r.region=#{region}
SELECT FROM reservation r JOIN shop s ON s.id=r.shop_id LEFT JOIN reservation_slot rs ON rs.id=r.slot_id WHERE r.id=#{id} AND s.merchant_id=#{merchantId} AND r.region=#{region}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM reservation WHERE user_id=#{userId} AND region=#{region} AND status=#{status}

SELECT FROM reservation r JOIN shop s ON s.id=r.shop_id LEFT JOIN reservation_slot rs ON rs.id=r.slot_id WHERE r.user_id=#{userId} AND r.region=#{region} AND r.status=#{status} ORDER BY r.id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.sql: WHERE s.merchant_id=#{merchantId} AND r.region=#{region} AND r.shop_id IN #{scopedShopId} AND r.shop_id=#{shopId} AND r.status=#{status} AND CAST(r.reserve_time AS DATE)>=#{dateFrom} AND CAST(r.reserve_time AS DATE)<=#{dateTo}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM reservation r JOIN shop s ON s.id=r.shop_id
SELECT FROM reservation r JOIN shop s ON s.id=r.shop_id LEFT JOIN reservation_slot rs ON rs.id=r.slot_id ORDER BY r.reserve_time DESC,r.id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.update: UPDATE reservation SET status=3,cancelled_at=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,updated_at=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id=#{id} AND user_id=#{userId} AND status IN(0,1)

UPDATE reservation SET slot_id=#{slotId},reserve_time=#{reserveTime},status=#{status},reschedule_count=reschedule_count+1,confirmed_at=CASE WHEN #{status}=1 THEN CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ELSE NULL END,updated_at=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id=#{id} AND user_id=#{userId} AND status IN(0,1)

UPDATE reservation SET status=#{toStatus},confirmed_at=CASE WHEN #{toStatus}=1 THEN CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ELSE confirmed_at END,arrived_at=CASE WHEN #{toStatus}=2 THEN CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ELSE arrived_at END,rejected_at=CASE WHEN #{toStatus}=4 THEN CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ELSE rejected_at END,updated_at=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id=#{id} AND region=#{region} AND status=#{fromStatus} AND shop_id IN (SELECT id FROM shop WHERE merchant_id=#{merchantId})

UPDATE reservation SET slot_id=#{slotId},reserve_time=#{reserveTime},status=#{status},reschedule_count=reschedule_count+1,confirmed_at=CASE WHEN #{status}=1 THEN CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ELSE NULL END,updated_at=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id=#{id} AND region=#{region} AND status IN(0,1) AND shop_id IN (SELECT id FROM shop WHERE merchant_id=#{merchantId})
mapper.select: SELECT id,reservation_id,action_type,operator_type,operator_id,from_status,to_status,old_reserve_time,new_reserve_time,remark,created_at FROM reservation_change_log WHERE reservation_id=#{reservationId} ORDER BY id DESC
